mapper.select: select ti.id track_id, ti.track_title trackTitle, ti.media_duration mediaDuration, ti.order_num orderNum, ti.create_time createTime, max(IF(ts.stat_type = '0701', ts.stat_num, -1)) playStatNum, max(IF(ts.stat_type = '0704', ts.stat_num, -1)) commentStatNum from track_info ti inner join track_stat ts on ti.id = ts.track_id and ti.is_deleted = 0 and ts.is_deleted = 0 where ti.album_id = #{albumId} and ti.status = '0501' GROUP BY ti.id order by ti.order_num asc
